headline: AST SpaceMobile Launches BlueBird Trio As Key Investor Turning Point
summary: AST SpaceMobile plans to launch three next generation BlueBird satellites, numbered 8, 9, and 10, on a SpaceX Falcon 9 on June 17. The mission follows the setback of the BlueBird 7 satellite and is intended to advance the company’s direct to smartphone network. The new satellites are designed to nearly double peak data speeds and are backed by partners including AT&T, Verizon, and Google. For investors watching NasdaqGS:ASTS, this launch comes after a period of sharp share price swings. The...

headline: EchoStar Default Puts LEO Spending Plans And Liquidity Under Scrutiny
summary: EchoStar (NasdaqGS:SATS) withheld roughly US$183 million of interest payments, triggering a default event with a 30 day grace period. The company is conserving cash while it waits for proceeds tied to AT&T related transactions. This missed payment is a material credit event that raises questions about liquidity and financial flexibility. EchoStar operates in satellite communications and related services, an area that has seen ongoing investment needs for network capacity, technology...

headline: AT&T Launches Unlimited Day Pass, Bringing Connectivity to iPad Users Regardless of Carrier
summary: What's the News: Today, AT&T launched Unlimited Day Pass, a 24-hour unlimited wireless data1 connection for eligible U.S. iPad users, including non-AT&T customers, for a daily2*$3 flat rate — with no contracts, subscriptions or credit checks required.

headline: Adaptive ML and AT&T Expand AI Collaboration to Scale Specialized Models Across Enterprise Workflows
summary: Adaptive ML, the leader in Reinforcement Learning Operations (RLOps), today announced the renewal and expansion of its work with AT&T. Following a year of successful production deployment, AT&T has now doubled its software footprint within the Adaptive Engine platform and embedded Adaptive Forward Deployed Engineers (FDEs) to accelerate the transition from prototypes built using closed proprietary LLMs prototypes to autonomous, agentic systems.

headline: Is AT&T (T) Quietly Rewiring Its Revenue Mix With Connected Car And Fiber Bundles?
summary: In early June 2026, LiveOne announced an expanded collaboration with AT&T and Cisco to integrate personalized, bundled in-vehicle entertainment into select AT&T Connected Car-equipped vehicles, while AT&T also simplified its fiber home internet lineup to four speed tiers with bundled wireless savings and added features like free Internet Backup and All-Fi Pro on its top plan. AT&T’s recent moves, including a multibillion-dollar ESOP-related shelf registration and deeper partnerships in areas...

headline: Nasdaq Announces Results from 2026 Annual Meeting of Shareholders
summary: All 12 Nominated Directors Elected Nasdaq Board Re-elects Adena T. Friedman as Chair of the Board NEW YORK, June 10, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Nasdaq, Inc. (Nasdaq: NDAQ) shareholders elected all nominated directors at the company’s Annual Meeting of Shareholders on Wednesday, June 10, 2026. All directors will serve one-year terms. headline: SpaceX Proxy EchoStar Sees Its Stock Drop. It Could Be a Bad Omen for SpaceX IPO.
summary: EchoStar  stock has been struggling lately and it could bode ill for the coming SpaceX initial public offering on Thursday.  SpaceX is one the best proxies for SpaceX because the satellite company reached a deal last year to sell spectrum to SpaceX in return for about 2% of SpaceX stock—some 262 million shares.  EchoStar  stock has nearly doubled since the first of two spectrum deals was reached with SpaceX in September.

content.title: SpaceX Proxy EchoStar Sees Its Stock Drop. It Could Be a Bad Omen for SpaceX IPO.

EchoStar  stock has nearly doubled since the first of two spectrum deals was reached with SpaceX in September.

headline: AT&T AI Partnerships Target New Growth Beyond Core Telecom Business
summary: AT&T (NYSE:T) announced an expanded client collaboration with Wiliot to deploy its Physical AI platform across large supply chains. The company renewed its partnership with Adaptive ML, with plans to double its use of the AI and machine learning platform for fraud detection and customer engagement. AT&T also entered a commercial collaboration with Derq to bring real time AI roadway safety intelligence into its Intelligent Transportation Platform. AT&T, trading at $23.21, is using these...

headline: AST SpaceMobile’s SpaceX Catalyst Could Come With a Volatility Warning

headline: Why AT&T gave $1.2 million to first-time feature filmmakers
